emails.subject: Fundamentals  Welcome Mara
emails.body: Fundamentals Welcome Mara Barry asked me to send you this article about DWR in yesterday's Gas Daily. The article is on page 5. I am not sure if this will work; if it doesn't, email me back and I will send the article a different way. Thanks, Mara Bronstein

emails.subject: RE: Fundamentals  Welcome Mara
emails.body: RE: Fundamentals Welcome Mara Didn't work. Was it in yesterday's gas daily? If so, I can access it. Thanks very much for your help. Best, Jeff

emails.subject: RE: Fundamentals  Welcome Mara
emails.body: RE: Fundamentals Welcome Mara Sorry. It was in yesterday's Gas Daily on page 5. Mara
